case_title: MUHAMMAD ASHFAQ VS. ADAM HALASZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 (SC-100 FORM STAMPED: "FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST') FILED BY ASHFAQ, MUHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT HALASZ, ADAM ELANCE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASHFAQ, MUHAMMAD
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF ASHFAQ, MUHAMMAD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: REGISTERED AGENT SOLUTIONS, INC. - FOR ELANCE, INC.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASHFAQ, MUHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT ELANCE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED DEC-02-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELANCE, INC.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASHFAQ, MUHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT HALASZ, ADAM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ELANCE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ADAM HALASZ WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AND THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER SANCHEZ--DISPUTE MANAGER. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ADAM HALASZ BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-14-2015 AT 10:00 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASHFAQ, MUHAMMAD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELANCE, INC. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST ADAM HALASZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
